text.title: Product Development Trends Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. The validator script enforces required keys plus per-field constraints; forbidden patterns enumerate shapes the agent must never emit.

example.note: Quarter not in YYYYQ# format; trend label is one buzzword; verdict 'maybe' violates the trichotomy; scores + kill_criteria missing; source_map absent.

list.pattern: All sources from one class (e.g., all practitioner blogs).
